overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game showing a hooded assassin running through a Middle Eastern old city. The character moves from narrow market alleys through garden courtyards and into open plazas filled with NPCs, with a stealth detection mechanic activating at the end.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered market alley with wooden stalls and clay pottery. The character runs forward, exiting the covered area into a sunlit path with a large hay pile and stone walls.

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a garden path lined with blue flowering bushes and palm trees, then ascends a set of stone stairs toward a large stone archway. An NPC in dark robes stands near the wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with crowd and surrounding stone buildings

covered stall with fabric canopy and goods

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit open plaza filled with NPCs. A stealth detection mechanic activates, highlighting nearby characters with white outlines. The character continues moving through the crowd toward the center of the plaza, passing market stalls and stone structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a covered market into the expansive brightness of a crowded city plaza. It begins within a shaded alley lined with wooden stalls and clay pottery, moving forward as the character exits the cover into a sunlit path marked by stone walls and a large hay pile. As the path opens up, the camera follows the character along a garden walkway bordered by palm trees and blue flowering bushes, ascending stone stairs toward a large archway while passing a robed figure. The scene then expands into a wide, sun-drenched plaza filled with NPCs, where a stealth detection mechanic activates to highlight nearby characters with white outlines. Finally, the camera pushes through the dense crowd and past various market stalls toward the center of the open square.
